mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_order (user_id, order_no, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, order_no, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, created_at FROM shop_order WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, order_no, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, created_at FROM shop_order WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, order_no, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, created_at FROM shop_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
